title: Uruguayan Empanada Kale Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful soup filled with roasted kale and empanadas, inspired by the flavors of Uruguay.

ingredients.name: Roasted Kale
ingredients.notes: From 1 bunch of kale, roasted at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes

ingredients.name: Uruguayan Empanadas
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought, filled with beef or chicken for added flavor

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing the onions and garlic

ingredients.name: Chicken Broth
ingredients.notes: For a rich and savory soup

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the roasted kale and chopped empanadas to the pot.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the soup has thickened slightly.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional roasted kale and empanadas if desired.
Optional: add a dollop of sour cream or a sprinkle of queso fresco for added creaminess and flavor.
